query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "beyond the current observation: evaluating multimodal large language m" computer science
rationale: This paper is a foundational survey that establishes the canonical definitions, architectures, and evaluation metrics for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), satisfying criterion (d) as a foundational methodology/reference for any research extending or evaluating this specific class of models.
